results.rendered_html:
asaścat a. Ved.
1 Not disposed to go, not going;  Rv. 8. 31. 4. 
2 Unceasing, inexhaustible, not drying up.
3 Not closed up, not defeated or overcome, untouched (as by any one attempting to enter a door).
